name: CData Sync
description: CData Sync — ETL and data replication from 250+ SaaS apps and databases to warehouses. JDBC/ODBC drivers plus scheduled pipelines.

seo.title: CData Sync — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: CData Sync: CData Sync — ETL and data replication from 250+ SaaS apps and databases to warehouses. JDBC/ODBC drivers plus scheduled pipelines.

when_to_use: Replicating 250+ SaaS app data to Snowflake or Redshift
Scheduled incremental sync from Salesforce to data warehouses
JDBC/ODBC access to SaaS data for BI tool connections
ETL pipelines without custom code via drag-and-drop UI
Replacing manual CSV exports with automated data sync

pros: Flat licensing instead of per-row pricing
cons: UI and UX feel dated compared to Fivetran
Schema drift handling less automatic than competitors
Community support thin; mostly enterprise support
Transformation layer basic vs dbt-native tools
review.verdict: Cost-predictable ETL for long-tail connectors; not as slick as Fivetran but often cheaper at scale.
review.best_for: Teams needing niche SaaS connectors without Fivetran's row-based pricing
review.not_for: Modern data stack shops wanting tight dbt and orchestrator integration
